allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('db.js','utf8'\); const lines=c.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('Line 60 hex:', Buffer.from\(lines[59]\).toString\('hex'\)\); console.log\('Line 61 hex:', Buffer.from\(lines[60]\).toString\('hex'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('rows count:', r.rows.length, '| has agent_decision field:', r.rows.length>0 ? 'agent_decision' in r.rows[0] : 'N/A'\); }\);" echo "" kill %1 echo "DONE")

Bash(node -e " process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const row=r.rows[0]; if\(row\) { console.log\('agent_decision in row:', 'agent_decision' in row\); console.log\('agent_message in row:', 'agent_message' in row\); console.log\('sca_url in row:', 'sca_url' in row\); } else console.log\('no rows'\); }\); " echo "" echo "DONE" taskkill /F /IM node.exe)
